title: Riot on Redchurch Street: The Director's Cut
original_title: Riot on Redchurch Street - The Director's Cut
overview: A rock and roll love triangle that ignites Anglo-Muslim racial tension in East London. Now there's a riot on Redchurch Street that can only end in blood-fire and redemption.
